calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar May-03-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Steve Levy, Esq., Law Offices of Steve Levy, Telephone 800-637-6922, appearing for Plaintiff;(called by the courtroom clerk)
Phuong Tran, Telephone 415-832-9587, appearing on his own behalf as pro per defendant;

Defendant/judgment debtor, appeared for the hearing accompanied by his wife. Judge Ulmer allowes Mr. Tran's wife to speak on his behalf. The Courtroom clerk calls Mr. Levy, counsel for plaintiff, to allow for the opportunity for plaintiff/judgment creditor to appear. Plaintiff's counsel states that he was not informed that defendant would be contesting this matter and making a court appearance.

PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

Taken under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

**After the hearing an ORDER DETERMING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is signed.
